summary: The diff implements REQ-1 by adding backend seeding logic in main.mo (6 default wage entries seeded when store is empty via getAllWageEntries), a migration module for the new seedDefaultWages flag, a useSeedDefaultEntries hook in the frontend, and UI integration in WageCalculator.tsx. The implementation appears to cover all core requirements, though one constraint issue exists: the new hook file was placed under frontend/src/hooks/ which is listed as an immutable path.

hallucinated_features.description: A file was added at frontend/src/hooks/useSeedDefaultEntries.ts, which is under the immutable path frontend/src/hooks/. The build constraints explicitly state 'Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths).' Adding a new file to this directory violates that constraint.
hallucinated_features.reason: The constraint says the hooks directory is immutable (no modifications), but a new hook file was created there.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend/migration.mo file was added to handle stable memory migration for the new seedDefaultWages boolean field. This was not explicitly requested in the requirements.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any migration module or stable memory upgrade path; this is an extra architectural addition beyond what was specified.
